_: TEMPLATE — DO NOT load this file directly. The SNIP local-mirror entrypoint (deploy/snip-mirror-entrypoint.sh) renders this file by substituting __VALIDATOR_PUBKEY__ with a freshly-generated keypair (or a mounted operator key) on first container boot, optionally merging /config/extra-alloc.json into .alloc, and writes the result to /data/genesis.json. After the chain DB exists the rendered file is reused verbatim — never re-rendered. SNIP local mirror / disposable devnet only; never use this for production validator deployment.
